seo_h1: Simus the Philosopher and the Testimonies

seo.browser_title: Simus the Philosopher on Eulogikon Greek Archive Collection
seo.meta_title: Simus the Philosopher Ancient Greek Works Collection
seo.meta_description: Simus the Philosopher, a Hellenistic thinker. Surviving philosophical works in the Attic dialect. Free to read and download from the Greek library archive.

biography_html:
No biographical information for a philosopher named Simus from the 3rd century BCE to the 2nd century CE exists in major reference works. While the name appears in antiquity, it is attributed to figures such as a comic poet, a musician, and a physician, not a philosopher from this period.

No philosophical writings are attributed to Simus in the consulted sources. The suggestion of a single work in collection format lacks corroborating evidence from extant classical literature or scholarship.

Simus the Philosopher holds no documented significance in the mainstream philosophical tradition. His absence from authoritative encyclopedias indicates he is not a recognized figure of influence from the Hellenistic or Roman Imperial eras.
